hooks.template: If you don’t have (insert item/action), do (insert item/action).
hooks.text: If your supplier won't take your card, stop pushing it and wire the cash instead.

hooks.template: They said, “(insert famous cliché or quote)” — that’s a lie.
hooks.text: They told every business owner “just pay your supplier by card.” That is a lie.

hooks.template: When I (insert action), people said (insert feedback).
hooks.text: A business owner offered the card. The supplier said wire it, no plastic here.

hooks.template: My customer/client got (insert dream result) without (insert pain point).
hooks.text: Smart business owners pay China suppliers fast without the 2 to 4 percent card surcharge.

hooks.template: What (insert title) says vs what they mean.
hooks.text: What your supplier says: “yes, card okay.” What they mean: “plus 4 percent.”
